description_long: This is a tall, slender wine bottle with a deep burgundy body and a matte black neck and closure. The bottle features a rectangular label on the front, predominantly green with some white and possibly grape-themed imagery, and text that is partially legible. The neck is long and gently tapers upward to a slightly wider, cylindrical closure, which appears to be covered by a black capsule. The bottle's body is smooth and cylindrical, with a subtle shoulder transition from the neck to the main body. The base is not fully visible, but the overall silhouette suggests a classic wine bottle shape, likely made of glass. The label is centered on the front, providing branding and product information.
description: A tall, burgundy wine bottle with a black neck and closure, featuring a green and white label on the front. The bottle has a smooth, classic shape and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green and white label with text and imagery on the burgundy bottle body.
description_view_1: Side view with the label partially visible, highlighting the smooth cylindrical body and the long black neck.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the uninterrupted burgundy surface of the bottle, with no label visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the edge of the label just visible, emphasizing the bottle's symmetry and matte finish.
attribute_label_or_branding: A rectangular label is present on the front of the bottle, predominantly green with white text and grape imagery. The label is centered, medium-sized, and wraps slightly around the sides. Some text is visible but not fully legible.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow, and gently tapered neck with a straight profile and a slightly flared transition to the closure.
